_comment: Developer announcements shown in the app. Add an object to the list to broadcast a message. Rules: give every entry a NEW unique id (reusing an id won't re-show); title is required; body/action/date optional; use \n for line breaks in body; action.url must be http/https; type is info | warning | update; minVersion/maxVersion (optional) target app versions, e.g. "maxVersion":"1.5.9" to nudge only older builds to update. The app only READS this file.

announcements.title: 🚨 Heads up — cloud sync paused
announcements.body:
Cloud sync for My List, Continue Watching, Watch Together, and Cloud Backup is temporarily paused. The app uses a free cloud service to sync across devices — and we hit the monthly limit. 😅

The good news:
✅ The app works fine — nothing is lost.
✅ Everything is saved locally on your device.
✅ Only cross-device syncing / cloud features are paused.

📅 Auto-recovers on July 18, when the limit resets.
🔧 An upcoming update fixes this permanently — your items will sync back automatically. No need to re-add anything!

🐛 The local My List issue is fixed today — releasing soon! 🎉

Thanks for your patience! 🍿🔥
